response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals, strong architectural thinking, and proven mentoring ability, the role requires deep C++ expertise and industrial automation domain knowledge that are absent from his background. His last direct C++ experience was over a decade ago at National Instruments; recent years have focused on web/SaaS platforms using TypeScript/Node.js. The lack of IEC 62443 standards knowledge, IoT/embedded systems background, and networking/multi-threading expertise documented in the resume makes this a significant mismatch for a mid-senior position requiring hands-on C++ development and architectural leadership in industrial automation.
strengths: Excellent software craftsmanship foundation with proven expertise in TDD, design patterns, and software architecture across multiple domains
Strong leadership and mentoring background demonstrated through staff-level roles, public workshops, and open-source community contributions
Demonstrated ability to rapidly learn and adopt new technologies across full-stack development, web, mobile, and embedded systems
concerns: Critical gap in current C++ expertise—last hands-on C++ work was 10+ years ago; recent career focused entirely on web/SaaS development with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No documented experience with industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA, DNP 3.0) required for this domain
Missing expertise in security standards (IEC 62443, SDL practices), networking/multi-threading architecture, and message-broker/MQTT systems central to the role
